$comment: TEST-003 functional-coverage manifest. Each framework capability that the CLI exposes must have a kit-based functional test (driving a real InteractiveSession via @robota-sdk/agent-framework/testing). The functional-coverage harness scan fails when a listed test is missing or does not use the harness. Add a row whenever you add a framework capability (see .agents/rules/testing-layering.md).

capabilities.description: The scriptedSession functional harness drives a real InteractiveSession (self-test / reference).
GOAL-001 autonomous objective loop: multi-turn pursuit, satisfied + max-iterations stop.
Denied tools are blocked end to end (side effect prevented, denial reported).
Resume restores a persisted conversation; fork restores context into a new session id.
Real recorded Qwen run drives goal pursuit to satisfied (real prompts + tool-use, replayed).
